steps.title: Link the claim to an example
steps.content: The first sentence gives a general principle: sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic than bulkier ones. The next sentence uses the streamlined Cessna 310 and the boxy semitruck to illustrate that principle.

steps.title: Reject nonexample transitions
steps.content: A signals contrast, but the Cessna supports the general claim. C signals addition, not illustration. D signals simultaneous events or comparison, not a specific example. The transition that introduces an example fits the sentence. The answer is B.
